title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・ツンツン女王

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How do you like that, Vodka? I'm the queen. Now
you have to do whatever I say.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I really wanted to win today! For more
reasons than one...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Fine... Go on then, Queen. Gimme an order!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
When we get back to our dorm, you'll be doing
alllll the chores. That includes the cleaning and
cooking...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And you'll be wearing a frilly maid apron, of
course. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Are you serious?! That's goin' way too far!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you're really gonna make me do that, I'm movin'
out! I'll get on my motorcycle and never come
back!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, you really don't like that one, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, I suppose I can choose something else.
I've got just the thing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I want you to keep being my rival.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You need to keep coming back to race me. Time
and time again. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? Why are you so quiet?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ya don't gotta get so serious out of nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who wanted me to choose
something different!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't take this anymore! Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet sends a flurry of kicks at Vodka. It
seems Vodka has incurred the queen's wrath.
